title: hieracium sparsum subsp. ottomalicum
intro: Hieracium sparsum subsp. ottomalicum, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Turkey and surrounding regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium sparsum subsp. ottomalicum include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as providing antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
